invitations.mainSubtitle: Review and respond to coach invitations
invitations.pendingSubtitle: You have pending invitations from coaches waiting for your response.
invitations.noPendingSubtitle: When a coach invites you, their invitation will appear here so you can accept or decline it.
invitations.linkedSubtitle: You are now linked to your coach. Redirecting to your home...
invitations.unlinkInfo: If you remove the association, your coach will no longer be able to assign you routines or see your progress.
invitations.confirmUnlinkMessage: Are you sure you want to remove the association with your coach? This action cannot be undone.

friendSession.mainSubtitle: Create or join a live training session with a friend
friendSession.generateSubtitle: Generate a session code to share with a friend
friendSession.generateInfo: Click the button to generate a unique session code
friendSession.redeemSubtitle: Enter the code shared by your friend to join the session
friendSession.redeemInfo: Paste the code you received and connect with your friend
friendSession.selfUseError: You cannot use your own invitation code
friendSession.footerInfo: Session codes let you train live with a friend in the virtual gym. Share them only with people you trust.

coachInvite.mainSubtitle: Generate a unique code so your client can link to you
coachInvite.generateSubtitle: Your client will use this code to link their account to yours
coachInvite.inviteByUserSubtitle: Enter the username or email of the client you want to invite.
coachInvite.inviteSentDescription: If {{username}} is online, they'll receive your invitation in real-time.
coachInvite.offlineFallback: Client offline? Share a code instead
coachInvite.infoBox: Share this code with your client. They will use it in their 'Invitations' section to link their account to yours. Each code can only be used once.
coachInvite.footerInfo: Once your client accepts the invitation, they will appear in your client list and you will be able to assign them routines and track their progress.

notifications.coachInviteTitle: {{coachName}} has invited you to be their client
notifications.coachInviteMessage: Accept to link your account with this coach.
